title: Cobble Your Mons
description: A Cobblemon 1.6 Modpack that includes everything I can possibly add to Cobblemon while still keeping it Vanilla+ and entirely Cobblemon based.
body:
**Remember to add the datapacks folder to your world and enable the resource packs for the full experience!**

I've been wanting to play Cobblemon with my friends but a lot of modpacks out there for 1.6 either seemed to have too much which made it overwhelming or too little which made it underwhelming. Feeling dissatisfied with the modpack choices, I decided to create my own that stays true to Vanilla+ without adding too much and taking away from the Cobblemon experience. The entire focus of the modpack is Cobblemon afterall. Most of the mods added are designed to improve the Cobblemon experience by adding things relevant to the original Pokemon games. 

**Some of the noteworthy mods/features added:**
- Cobblemon *(obviously)*
- Models and spawn locations for most of the missing pokemon/legendaries
- Megas and Z-moves *(check gallery for how to craft mega items)*
- Pokemon themed villages and structures
- Pokemon music (using Reactive Music)
- Minimap pokemon icons
- Trainers to battle
- Extra Cobblemon items with recipes
- Unimplemented Items Mod (without all the dry roots, iykyk)
- Expanding upon already implemented cobblemon features *(breeding, battling, loot drops, etc.)*
- Badges *(if people wanna be gym leaders in their multiplayer game)*
- Hats *(for fun)*
- The Aether *(Pokemon Spawn in the Aether and TMs are in dungeons)*
- Amendments
- More blocks and building tools
- Backpacks
- More armors, weapons, and tools
- QOL mods *(shift to mine a vein of ores or a tree instantly, waystones, inventory sorting and quick stacking, etc)*
- A bunch of optimization mods


*If starting a multiplayer server with this modpack, remove the Reactive Music mod from the server side mods bc it's only meant for client side.
